title: Visa Announced as Worldwide Tour Sponsor for BTS World Tour 'Arirang'
detail: On April 6, 2026, Visa announced via press release its status as the Worldwide Tour Sponsor for BTS WORLD TOUR 'ARIRANG' — spanning 82 shows in 34 cities across 23 countries. The partnership focuses on Asia Pacific markets including Kaohsiung, Bangkok, Kuala Lumpur, Singapore, Jakarta, Sydney, Hong Kong, and Manila. Visa cardholders can win complimentary concert tickets through issuing partner promotions and enjoy exclusive Visa-branded merchandise booths at venues. The deal builds on Visa's existing K-pop partnership portfolio including the MAMA Awards.

title: ARIRANG Spends Second Consecutive Week at #1 on Billboard 200 — K-pop First
detail: Billboard confirmed that BTS's ARIRANG held the #1 position on the Billboard 200 (chart dated April 11) for a second consecutive week, earning 187,000 equivalent album units in the week ending April 2 — a 71% drop from its record 641,000-unit debut. ARIRANG is the first K-pop album ever to spend two consecutive weeks at #1 on the Billboard 200, surpassing all previous BTS albums which each peaked for a single week. Of the 187,000 units: 114,000 were album sales, 65,000 from streaming equivalents (SEA), and 8,000 from track equivalents (TEA). Kanye West's 'Bully' debuted at #2 behind BTS.
